descriptions.text: Mother 3: Opposing Force is a new story hack aiming to tell the tale of a mostly unseen side of MOTHER 3--that of the Pigmasks. Spread good will and happiness to the residents of Tazmily through ruthless tactics and planning, and top it all off with a relaxing night at Club Titiboo. This hack will take the player through key events of Chapters 4-7 from a uniquely porkish perspective.
